prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock K20A i-VTEC (2.0L DOHC, 158 PS) with a fully built K20A Type R (K20A2) long block featuring forged internals: JE 87mm forged pistons (11.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL Race Series bearings, and a K1 Technologies billet crankshaft. Pair with a Toda Racing Stage 3 head package (port-matched, oversized valves, upgraded valve springs/retainers) and a Toda Racing camshaft set (272° duration, 11.5mm lift) for high-RPM power delivery (220+ PS at 8,500 RPM).

Forced Induction: Install a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.64 A/R turbine housing, 56 trim compressor) with a custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo manifold (Spoon Sports or HKS cast manifold) and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller. Use a PWR intercooler (front-mount, 550x300x76mm core) with custom piping (3-inch aluminum, silicone couplers) and a Tomei 80mm titanium blow-off valve. Supporting mods: Walbro 255 LPH fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000 fuel injectors, and a Hondata KPro V4 ECU with custom tune for 1.5 bar (21.7 psi) peak boost.

Drivetrain & Handling: Swap the stock 5-speed automatic for a 6-speed manual transmission from a Honda Accord Euro R (CL7) with a Quaife ATB helical LSD. Upgrade the clutch to a Spec Stage 3+ twin-disc setup (240mm, 6-puck carbon discs) and lightweight flywheel (10.5 lbs). Suspension: Tein Flex Z coilovers (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear) with Swift springs, Cusco front strut bar, and a SPC Adjustable Rear Camber Arm Kit (-2.5° camber). Brakes: Spoon Sports 4-piston calipers (front) with 320mm slotted rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads, paired with a Nissin 2-piston rear caliper upgrade and stainless steel braided lines.
estetica: Body Kit: Install a Mugen Sports Aero Kit (front bumper, side skirts, rear bumper, rear wing) with custom carbon fiber canards (Seibon) and a Mugen carbon fiber hood (20% weight reduction). Paint: Honda Championship White (NH-578) with matte black accents (3M 1080 vinyl wrap) on the roof, mirrors, and lower body panels. Wheels: Work Emotion CR Kiwami (17x8 +45 front, 17x9 +40 rear) with Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires (215/45/17 front, 235/40/17 rear).

Interior: Replace stock seats with Bride Zeta III (fixed-back, carbon shell) in black Alcantara with red stitching, paired with a Mugen RSZ steering wheel (suede, 350mm) and NRG quick-release hub. Shift knob: Mugen short shifter with titanium shift fork and carbon fiber shift boot. Gauges: Defi Advance BF series (oil pressure, oil temp, boost, wideband AFR) mounted on a custom A-pillar pod. Sound deadening: Dynamat Xtreme applied to doors, floor, and roof for NVH reduction.

Lighting & Details: Replace headlights with Morimoto XB LED projectors (3000K) and JDM Honda Stream RSZ-specific clear side markers. Taillights: Custom sequential LED units (V-LED) with smoked lenses. Exterior accents: Mugen RSZ badges (front fenders, rear hatch), carbon fiber side mirror covers (Seibon), and a custom titanium exhaust tip (76mm, rolled edge) from TiAL Sport. Underbody: Cusco front and rear underbody braces, paired with a Spoon Sports rear subframe brace for chassis rigidity.
